name: FRANCIS BERNARD AUER, et al. v. DAVID A. ROBBINS et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in FRANCIS BERNARD AUER, et al. v. DAVID A. ROBBINS et al. (519 U.S. 452, 1996 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
